maintain.name: Reaped Soul
maintain.note: pooled point resource: 3 Soul Fragments make a Reaped Soul, 3 Reaped Souls grant a Soul Infusion that enables powerful abilities (Soul Collector). Build then spend.

procs.name: Slaughter
procs.when: target below 35% health (execute-only; generates 1 Reaped Soul)

procs.name: Harvest Time
procs.when: on cooldown as a burst window: +15% damage and crit, and Soul Infusion spells have a 50% chance not to consume the effect for 15 sec

Harvest.st: Build Reaped Souls with Reap (+1) / Wraithblade (+3, 30s CD) / Spectre Stride (+20 Runic), then spend Reaped Souls with Tormented Souls; use Crow's Harvest to convert Soul Fragments and Slaughter as an execute below 35%.
Harvest.aoe: Crow's Harvest strikes all nearby enemies and harvests up to 3 Soul Fragments; open Harvesting Grounds and Harvest Time for burst on packs.
Harvest.summary: Build Reaped Souls (Reap / Wraithblade) then spend with Tormented Souls; Slaughter executes below 35%. AoE: Crow's Harvest.

maintain.name: Reaped Soul
maintain.note: pooled point resource: 3 Soul Fragments make a Reaped Soul, 3 Reaped Souls grant a Soul Infusion (Soul Collector). Build then spend with Tormented Souls.

maintain.name: Ghostly Weapon
maintain.note: weapon imbue lasting 15 sec (2 charges, 40s recharge) adding 25% Frost damage to melee attacks; keep it applied.

procs.name: Endbringer
procs.when: on cooldown as a burst window: for 15 sec Dirge deals 30% more damage, generates 3 Reaped Souls, and heals you

procs.name: Deathchaser
procs.when: target below 20% health as an execute (Chasing Death reapplies it until the target dies or 5 sec pass)

Soul.st: Build Reaped Souls with Dirge (+2) / Reap (+1) / Wraithblade (+3), then spend them with Tormented Souls; keep Ghostly Weapon up and use Endbringer to flood Reaped Souls, Deathchaser to execute.
Soul.summary: Keep Ghostly Weapon up. Build Reaped Souls (Dirge / Wraithblade) then spend with Tormented Souls; Endbringer for burst, Deathchaser executes.

maintain.name: Reaped Soul
maintain.note: pooled point resource: 3 Soul Fragments make a Reaped Soul, 3 Reaped Souls grant a Soul Infusion (Soul Collector). Pool then release into Spectral Scythe / Tormented Souls.

procs.name: Bolstered Form
procs.when: when Painmail stacks are ready to consume / for its 15 sec armor and parry defensive window (generates 30 Runic Power)

Domination.st: Build Reaped Souls with Dreadwake (+1 cone) / Reap (+1) / Wraithblade (+3), then release them with Spectral Scythe (summons one scythe per active Reaped Soul, 45s CD) or Tormented Souls.
Domination.aoe: Spectral Scythe scales with the number of Reaped Souls active and Soul Strike makes each scythe cleave 5 nearby enemies, so pool Reaped Souls before releasing into a pack.
Domination.summary: Build Reaped Souls (Dreadwake / Wraithblade) then release with Spectral Scythe; pool before AoE. Tormented Souls as backup spender.
